recommendations.title: Against the Ropes
recommendations.overview: A fictional story inspired by North America's most famous female boxing promoter, Jackie Kallen. Her struggle to survive and succeed in a male dominated sport.

recommendations.title: My Winnipeg
recommendations.overview: The geographical dead center of North America and the beloved birthplace of Guy Maddin, Winnipeg, is the frosty and mysterious star of Maddin’s film. Fact, fantasy and memory are woven seamlessly together in this work, conjuring a city as delightful

recommendations.title: Expedition Happiness
recommendations.overview: A German couple and their dog travel across North America in a school bus searching for a state of pure bliss.

recommendations.title: Anomalisa
recommendations.overview: An inspirational speaker becomes reinvigorated after meeting a lively woman who shakes up his mundane existence.

recommendations.title: Bombshell: The Hedy Lamarr Story
recommendations.overview: The life and career of the hailed Hollywood movie star and underappreciated genius inventor, Hedy Lamarr.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

The most famous murder scene in movie history comprises 78 camera settings and 52 cuts: the shower scene in Alfred Hitchcock's Psycho. 78/52 tells the story of the man behind the curtain and his greatest obsession.

recommendations.title: Lost in Translation
recommendations.overview: Two lost souls visiting Tokyo -- the young, neglected wife of a photographer and a washed-up movie star shooting a TV commercial -- find an odd solace and pensive freedom to be real in each other's company, away from their lives in America.

recommendations.title: Taxidermia
